title: raputia neblinensis
intro: Raputia neblinensis, also known as the Neblina tree or Raputia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Raputia neblinensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as acne and eczema. Herbal preparations of Raputia neblinensis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
